problem id: da778b21
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11101111 -> 10001110
  10010010 -> 00111101
  10001101 -> 10001001
  11011011 -> 01011101
  01110101 -> 01101111
  10011100 -> 10001101
  00101100 -> 01001111
  11010000 -> 10111101
  10100000 -> 01111111

query: 00101110
predicted answer: 11000111
